pr.title: Mamba-3 SSD + Attention Hybrid with QAT (1.5633 bpb)

output.summary: Hybrid model runs Mamba-3 SISO SSD blocks with one attention layer, tuning QAT coverage and hardware-aware warmdown for INT6 compression.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard training/eval regime; not explicitly val-only.
techniques: Mamba-3 SISO SSD + single attention hybrid
Extend QAT to SSD projections via CastedLinear swap
Scale warmdown iters to hardware step latency
